reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the film-career duration described for Harry Sweet and John Biddle.
2. Compare the durations and return who had the longer film career.
original_final_question: Who had a longer film career, Harry Sweet or John Biddle? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Harry Sweet worked in film from about 1919 to 1933, while John Scott Biddle had a film-making career spanning more than forty years, so John Scott Biddle had the longer film career. -> John Scott Biddle
